flex-1","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"yieldless/cache"}]," stores successful tuple load results and shares in-flight loads for the same key. It is useful for API clients, metadata readers, schema discovery, docs search, and any expensive async read where several callers can ask for the same thing."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"It is intentionally small: no background worker, no global store, no runtime. The cache loads on demand, expires entries by TTL, evicts least-recently-used entries by size, and keeps errors out of the cache."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row e:["$","h2",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"behavior-notes","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#behavior-notes","className":"peer","children":"Behavior notes"}],["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}],"$undefined"]}]]}]
f:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Only successful ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[null, value]"}]," results are cached."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Concurrent ",["$","code",null,{"children":"get()"}]," calls for the same key share the same load."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"refresh()"}]," skips the stored value and starts or joins the in-flight load."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"delete(key)"}]," removes cached and in-flight work for the key, aborting an in-flight load."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"clear()"}]," removes all cached entries and aborts all in-flight loads."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"ttlMs"}]," defaults to no expiry. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"maxSize"}]," defaults to a very large limit."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Reading a cached value refreshes its LRU position."}],"\n"]}]
10:["$","h2",null,{"className":"flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2","id":"good","children":[["$","a",null,{"data-card":"","href":"#good","className":"peer","children":"Good"}],["$","svg",null,{"xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100","aria-hidden":true,"children":[["$","path","1cjeqo",{"d":"M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"}],["$","path","19qd67",{"d":"M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"}],"$undefined"]}]]}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"Cache read-through data at the boundary."}]
